title: Smoky Velvety Indian Ginger Garlic Paste Stir-fry
description: This light Polish dish features a smoky, velvety ginger garlic paste infused with tandoor spices and is jain-friendly, perfect for an evening meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons Indian ginger garlic paste
ingredients.notes: For a milder flavor, use 1 tablespoon.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: For a lighter touch, you can use avocado or sesame oil.

ingredients.name: Pinch of sugar (optional)
ingredients.notes: For sweetness and balance, can be omitted.

instructions: Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and continue cooking for an additional minute.
Pour in the Indian ginger garlic paste mixture. Cook, stirring continuously, for about 2 minutes to meld flavors.
Gradually add water while continuously mixing until a smooth consistency is achieved (adjust salt and sugar to taste).
Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for another 3-5 minutes until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
